original: A chromed contraption of alien design. The barrel of this strange, cumbersome device is made out of two spinning parts that generate opposite fluxes of energy. The conflicting gravitic fields then tear the target with crushing force. It must have been a mining or construction tool before, if the worn out hazard labels and ripped safety levers are any indication. Its supernatural power will carve your path to glory – assuming you can lift it, of course.
